title: correa speciosa var. virens
intro: Correa speciosa var. virens, also known as the pink or green Correa, is a flowering plant native to Western Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Correa speciosa var. virens include its ability to reduce fever, soothe sore throats, and calm digestive issues. Correa speciosa var. virens can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil to utilize its medicinal properties.
